nameMeanings.name: Horton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Warwickshire): habitational name from one or other of the many places so called, such as those in Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Herefordshire, Northamptonshire, Shropshire, Somerset, Staffordshire, Wiltshire, and Yorkshire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English horh or horu ‘dirt, filth’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some may have different origins, including Horton in Gloucestershire, which may derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + tūn.

variants.name: Horten
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Horten, from an unattested word denoting ‘uneven, hard and lumpy soil’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Horton was born in 1385, in Hoole, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Horton, was 25 and his mother, Alice Eleanor Peter, was 21. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Alice de Saint Pierre. He died in 1450, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Horton est né en 1385, à Hoole, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Horton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Eleanor Peter, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Alice de Saint Pierre. Il est décédé en 1450, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Horton 1385 in Hoole, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Horton 25 und seine Mutter Alice Eleanor Peter 21. Er hatte mit Alice de Saint Pierre mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1450 im Alter von 65 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Horton è nato il nel 1385 nel Hoole, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William De Horton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Eleanor Peter, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Alice de Saint Pierre. Morì nel 1450, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Horton(이)가 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 후일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Horton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Eleanor Peter(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Alice de Saint Pierre(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Horton родился в 1385 г. в местности хул, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Horton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Eleanor Peter, 21. Он умер в 1450 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
